metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4607
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 11 (P,Q) shows α-adaptin localization at the postsynaptic membrane, to the side of the spine and near the PSD, using immunogold labeling in excitatory asymmetric synapses of the mouse hippocampal CA1 region.

The α-adaptin antibody is specific to AP2A1. Experimental description: "Three male C57BL/6 mice in the 10th to 12th postnatal weeks (CLEA Japan) were used for each analysis, including in situ hybridization, immunostaining, immunoelectron microscopy, and immunoblotting assays"

antibody: BD Biosciences Cat# 610501, RRID:AB_397867

according to PMID:34820873 table 1, this antibody is reactive to AP2A1L (αAL) and AP2A1S (αAS) but not AP2A2 (αC)

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
